construction.description: Connected penguin ribbon embedding for a paper figure; flipper_length_mm follows the main curve.
construction.curve_formula: x = 3.5*(s-0.5), y = 1.2*sin(pi*(s-0.5)) with orthogonal ribbon offset
construction.change_note: Ribbon widened from 0.08 to 0.12 to make the DR point cloud less thin while keeping the flipper trail story.
